expectations.text: Covers all 5 areas (accessibility, best-practices, SEO, performance, CWV)
expectations.evidence: All 5 areas mentioned: 접근성 (Accessibility), 보안/Best Practices, SEO, 성능 (Performance), Core Web Vitals
No mention of unified report generation. The output ends with a general conclusion paragraph but does not reference any report output format, HTML/CSV generation, or consolidated reporting.

The output uses a simple flat heading structure (Changed Files -> 5 sections -> Conclusion) without any numbered workflow steps, delegation to sub-skills, or verification phase. No structured audit methodology is evident.

eval_feedback.overall: The without_skill run covers all 5 audit areas but lacks the structured workflow and unified report generation that the skill provides. The output is a basic summary rather than a methodical audit.
